# Coverage Matrix (drifted fixture)

Self-contained coverage-matrix snippet for the drifted fixture. The module
path is relative to the fixture's own directory (passed as `repo_root`), so
`module.py` resolves to `tests/fixtures/semantic_drift/drifted/module.py`.

## Coverage Matrix

| Module | Capability | Notes |
|--------|------------|-------|
| module.py | drifted | Planted contradiction: returns a bare string, not a JSON object |

End of matrix table (blank line above terminates the parsed body).
